commands.summary: Built backend and renderer, ran renderer tests, backend HTTP/database/security tests, and Electron syntax checks. Added coverage for MCP token hashing, route restrictions, revocation, renderer redaction, and Settings MCP controls.
Built and tested the ForgeLink human MCP server, resources, prompts, install templates, and installer contract.
Rebuilt the app and captured Electron/dist/ui-preview.png through the visual smoke harness.

environment.redaction_note: The raw MCP token is generated in the desktop process, written to the local token file, stored only as a SHA-256 hash in SQLite, and never rendered in Settings, notifications, exports, or test snapshots. MCP bearer tokens are accepted only for agent-channel-safe routes.
